activity.description: Trigger when a new record is added in UiPath Data Fabric.

data.documentation: Triggered when new batch details are entered into LIMS. This event creates a new instance of the Batch Quality Case in Maestro and immediately initiates the Batch Intake stage for that batch.

data.label: Batch Intake

tasks.description: Parses the triggered batch input and extracts only the required fields needed for the quality case, discarding non-essential metadata.
RPA workflow that validates parsed batch data against required field criteria; routes incomplete batches to Data Completion Review for manual resolution.

rules.conditionExpression: =js:(vars.dataValidationOutput == "Input data contains missing or invalid fields")

data.description: Initiates the batch quality case when batch details are entered into LIMS. Parses and validates incoming batch data before the case proceeds to manufacturing readiness checks.

data.label: Data Completion Review

rules.conditionExpression: =js:vars.dataValidationOutput == "Input data contains missing or invalid fields"

outputs.name: BatchJsonString
outputs.source:
=js:JSON.stringify({
  record_id: vars.recordId,
  phase: vars.phase,
  batch_id: vars.batchId,
  product_name: vars.productName,
  test_or_signal: vars.testOrSignal,
  value: "",
  result_date: vars.resultDate,
  status: vars.status,
  analyst_id: "",
  instrument_id: ""
})
outputs.value:
=js:JSON.stringify({
  record_id: vars.recordId,
  phase: vars.phase,
  batch_id: vars.batchId,
  product_name: vars.productName,
  test_or_signal: vars.testOrSignal,
  value: vars.value,
  result_date: vars.resultDate,
  status: vars.status,
  analyst_id: "",
  instrument_id: ""
})

tasks.description: Human task to review and fill in missing or incomplete batch fields flagged during intake validation.
Updates the source system with the corrected data

data.description: Triggered when batch data fails completeness validation. Escalates missing or required fields to a human for resolution, then return the batch to the main flow.

data.label: Pre-Manufacturing

tasks.description: RPA workflow that retrieves pre-manufacturing phase records for the batch and passes them to the agents.

inputs.name: entityRecords
inputs.description: A JSON string containing the array of quality records to validate. Each record must include: phase, batch_id, product_name, test_or_signal, and value. Provide as a stringified JSON array. Do not omit required fields.

tasks.description: Agent that evaluates each pre-manufacturing record against the configured Pre-Manufacturing Readiness Rules to determine readiness status.
Agent that compares current pre-manufacturing results against historical product data and Trend and OOT Evaluation_Rules to detect early drift.
RPA workflow that writes both agents' outputs into the Evidence entity for this stage.

data.description: Evaluates manufacturing readiness by analyzing pre-manufacturing records for quality signals and historical trend patterns before the batch proceeds to manufacturing

data.label: In-Process QC

tasks.description: RPA workflow that retrieves in-process phase records for the batch and passes them to the agents.

inputs.name: entityRecords
inputs.description: A JSON string containing the array of quality records to validate. Each record must include: phase, batch_id, product_name, test_or_signal, and value. Provide as a stringified JSON array. Do not omit required fields.

tasks.description: Agent that evaluates each in-process record against the configured In-Process QC Rules to flag values nearing operating limits.
Agent that compares current in-process results against historical product data to detect mid-process drift before it reaches Final QC.
RPA workflow that writes both agents' outputs into the Evidence entity for this stage.

data.description: Monitors the batch during manufacturing by evaluating in-process quality records for signal deviations and process drift in real time.

data.label: Final QC

tasks.description: RPA workflow that retrieves final QC phase records for the batch and passes them to the agents.

inputs.name: entityRecords
inputs.description: A JSON string containing the array of quality records to validate. Each record must include: phase, batch_id, product_name, test_or_signal, and value. Provide as a stringified JSON array. Do not omit required fields.

tasks.description: Agent that evaluates each final QC record against the Final QC Specification Rules, with authority to flag a true Out of Specification result.
Agent that compares final QC results against historical data, with authority to flag an Out of Trend result when both the pattern and threshold conditions are breached.
RPA workflow that writes both agents' outputs into the Evidence entity for this stage.

data.description: Performs the release-grade quality evaluation by checking final QC records against specification limits and historical trend thresholds.

data.label: Evidence Review

outputs.name: ProcessStage
outputs.source:
=js:vars.processStage === "Pre-Manufacturing"
    ? "In-Process QC"
    : vars.processStage === "In-Process QC"
        ? "Final QC"
        : vars.processStage == "Final QC"
        ? "Closure"
        : vars.processStage
outputs.value:
=js:vars.processStage === "Pre-Manufacturing"
    ? "In-Process QC"
    : vars.processStage === "In-Process QC"
        ? "Final QC"
        : vars.processStage == "Final QC"
        ? "Closure"
        : vars.processStage

tasks.description: Reviewer confirms the accuracy and completeness of the agent-generated evidence for the current phase before release to the next stage.

data.description: Human checkpoint that validates the agents' evidence output before the case is allowed to proceed to the next stage. Runs once per QC phase (Pre-Manufacturing, In-Process, Final QC).

data.label: Recommendation and Review

tasks.description: Agent that evaluates all evidence records collected across the case against the Recommendation_Review_Rules and returns a risk level and recommendation summary.

tasks.description: QA reviewer evaluates the evidence and recommendation summary and decides to proceed, proceed with watchlist, or place the batch on hold.

activity.description: Send an email message based on the input parameters

message.subject: =js:("[Vigilance Q] Quality Assessment Completed - Case ID: " + metadata.ExternalId)

body.content:
=js:(`

Hello QA Team,

The Vigilance Q Quality Assessment workflow has been completed for the following record and is ready for review.

Case Details:
Case ID: ${metadata.ExternalId}
Record ID: ${vars.batchJsonString.record_id}
Batch ID: ${vars.batchJsonString.batch_id}
Product Name: ${vars.batchJsonString.product_name}
Result Date: ${vars.batchJsonString.result_date}
Status: ${vars.hitlFinalStatus}

Please review the case. You can access the case details using the Case ID referenced above.

Regards,
Vigilance Q

`)

tasks.description: Sends the finalized batch case, including all evidence and the review decision, to QA.

data.description: Consolidates evidence from all QC stages into a release recommendation, routes it to QA for a governed human decision, and notifies QA of the outcome.
